{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/61591917?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/romain-deperne/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/romain-deperne/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/romain-deperne/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/romain-deperne/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/romain-deperne", "id": 61591917, "login": "romain-deperne", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjYxNTkxOTE3", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/romain-deperne/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/romain-deperne/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/romain-deperne/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/romain-deperne/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/romain-deperne/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/romain-deperne", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-40864", "cvss": {"score": 5.4, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:R/S:U/C:N/I:L/A:L"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 5.4, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:R/S:U/C:N/I:L/A:L"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-352", "name": "Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF)"}], "description": "## Summary

JupyterHub's XSRF protection (updated in 4.1.0) inappropriately treated requests with `Sec-Fetch-Mode: no-cors` as same-origin requests, which they are not, bypassing XSRF checks. The JSON API is not affected, only HTTP form endpoints, such as `/hub/spawn` and `/hub/accept-share`, meaning attackers could trigger server spawn (but not access the server) and if the attacker is a JupyterHub user permitted to share access to their server, cause a user to accept a share and have access to the attacker's server.

## Patches

Upgrade to JupyterHub 5.4.5.

## Mitigations

If a reverse proxy is in use, drop requests to JupyterHub with `Sec-Fetch-Mode: no-cors`.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00159, "percentile": 0.05366}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-m68r-v472-jgq9", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-05T18:10:58Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-m68r-v472-jgq9", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-m68r-v472-jgq9"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-40864"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-22T21:16:43Z", "published_at": "2026-05-05T18:10:58Z", "references": ["https://github.com/jupyterhub/jupyterhub/security/advisories/GHSA-m68r-v472-jgq9", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-40864", "https://github.com/jupyterhub/jupyterhub/commit/9c5ec277d3cda5a59de2d8c8117efa77bd941127", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-m68r-v472-jgq9"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/jupyterhub/jupyterhub/security-advisories/GHSA-m68r-v472-jgq9", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/jupyterhub/jupyterhub", "summary": "JupyterHub has cross-origin form POSTs bypass XSRF (CWE-352)", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-08T23:20:51Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-m68r-v472-jgq9", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "5.4.5", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "jupyterhub"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 4.1.0, < 5.4.5"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: JupyterHub has cross-origin form POSTs bypass XSRF (CWE-352)
